untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) bullish candle formation as a pattern recognition concept, (2) downward retracement within upward trend (requires multi-bar pattern analysis), (3) primary trend direction context (requires trend analysis beyond allowed indicators), (4) conditional volume logic (above-average volume except in bull/down breakouts requires regime-specific conditional rules not supported by engine). The signal is primarily qualitative pattern-based and cannot be fully translated into mechanical indicator-only rules.
